pullRequest.title: [DOM-75659] Hotfix: revert dfsCommitId source to instance for backwards compatibility

nodes.body:
_⚠️ Potential issue_ | _🟠 Major_

**Preserve a fallback when `instance` is missing.**

`dfsCommitId = instance.map(_.inputCommitId)` returns `None` whenever `instance` is absent, even if `version.commitId` exists. That introduces a new null path for version-only responses. Prefer `instance.inputCommitId` first, then fallback to `version.commitId`.



<details>
<summary>Suggested fix</summary>

```diff
-      dfsCommitId = instance.map(_.inputCommitId),
+      dfsCommitId = instance.map(_.inputCommitId).orElse(version.commitId.map(_.name)),
```
</details>

<!-- suggestion_start -->

<details>
<summary>📝 Committable suggestion</summary>

> ‼️ **IMPORTANT**
> Carefully review the code before committing. Ensure that it accurately replaces the highlighted code, contains no missing lines, and has no issues with indentation. Thoroughly test & benchmark the code to ensure it meets the requirements.

```suggestion
      dfsCommitId = instance.map(_.inputCommitId).orElse(version.commitId.map(_.name)),
```

</details>

<!-- suggestion_end -->

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for AI Agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

In
`@apps/web/src/main/scala/domino/apps/web/transformers/AppVersionTransformer.scala`
at line 30, The DFS commit id assignment currently uses dfsCommitId =
instance.map(_.inputCommitId) which yields None when instance is absent; change
it to prefer the instance value first and fall back to the version value by
assigning dfsCommitId to
instance.map(_.inputCommitId).orElse(version.map(_.commitId)) (or the equivalent
for your Option types), referencing dfsCommitId, instance, inputCommitId,
version and commitId so version.commitId is used when instance is missing.
```

</details>

<!-- fingerprinting:phantom:poseidon:hawk -->

This is just a partial revert of https://github.com/cerebrotech/domino/commit/04b3d58db2dcc2c4a4014242bb367c65b509aa74
No need to handle that edge case

`@adrianrsy` Understood — since this is a partial revert to restore the pre-`04b3d58` behavior and the fix is explicitly temporary until the frontend is updated to read from `currentInstance.dfsCommitId`, the fallback isn't necessary. Thanks for the context!
